name: Soft Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a nine-inch square pan.
2. Cream together the butter and brown sugar until smooth.
3. Dissolve the baking soda in the vinegar.
4. Add the beaten egg yolks and molasses to the butter and sugar mixture.
5. Mix the ginger and ground cloves with the flour, then add these alternately with milk to the mixture, stirring gently after each addition.
6. Stir in the vinegar and baking soda mixture.
7. Beat the stiffly beaten egg whites until they form soft peaks.
8. Gently fold the egg whites into the batter until just combined.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until golden brown and done, about 30-35 minutes.
